title: About Me
description:
Theoretical physicist working at the intersection of quantum control, quantum computing, and machine learning.
  PhD candidate at Radboud University, Nijmegen.

services.title: Quantum Control & Feedback
services.description: Feedback protocols for open quantum systems: path-integral quantum control (PiQC), stochastic optimal control, and measurement-based quantum control.

services.title: Stochastic Quantum Dynamics and simulation
services.description: Lindblad master equations, quantum trajectories, continuous measurement theory, and geometric interpretations of quantum measurements.

services.title: Noise mitigation/error correction
services.description: Control strategies for noise mitigation and quantum error correction.

services.title: Scientific Software
services.description: I use Python, Julia and MATLAB for writing quality code for quantum simulation and quantum control applications.
